title: 10 Proverbs That Built Better Men Than Any Self-Help Book
caption:
Ten proverbs that are still building better men than any self-help book on the shelf.

Most men have heard them. Fewer have read them slowly. Almost none have built their lives around them. But the men who did — the ones who guarded their hearts, sharpened their brothers, kept their mouths, committed their work to God — those men became something.

Read them slowly. Pick one. Build it this month.

#scripture #proverbs #christianmen #faith #godlymen #manofgod #wisdomdaily
